author: R.- B.
msg:
I don’t know if I would buy an other one - it is a lot of money and right now it it requires quite a bit of trust that it will be better. I mean, we all hope that it will get better and all the promises are that it will be better. But so far some essential things are missing and then I’m referring to communication. The poor communication brings so much uncertainty, that for me I am hoping that will get better but looking at the way things are communicated. I am a little hesitant.  
Having said all of those things, of course I’m keeping my fingers crossed and I’m hoping that the project will actually deliver what it says it will, so I fully understand the wanting to buy another one IF the promises come true. So I guess it all comes down to how much trust do you have and that it will deliver.

author: Byron
msg: After they announced the doubling in price of a UN and locking period, I thought that they had to deliver something MONUMENTAL until February 4th. Something that would justify such a move. Currently less than half the licenses are sold with the initial sell (based on hype and false promises) being 75% of them. Unfortunately I haven't seen such a monumental move. I honestly do not know what they are thinking. With the current status, such a move diminishes even the slightest chance of a UNSL sale.

author: Val | WhiteBridge Noderunners | MNT SN.VN.UN
msg:
I think integration is taking a bit longer than what we thought (we were made believe in the communication)

Yeah communication could be better absolutely

msg:
Please refrain from stating false promises have been done

Unity team didn’t say ANYWHERE this would be all done and ready from day one

I claimed my first rewards as an UNO and ULO, using Uphold exchange via the Cardano network in ADA crypto. The fee was only $0.07.  Initially, i wanted XRP, but I don’t see the XRP Ledger network, which requires a Memo code.   I like ADA, so  I’ll just keep ADA for now.
It took me just a few minutes to transfer.

Tasks have been released during January, existing tasks have also increased in volume. Additional third party and official Unity Network tasks are set to launch during early February. Scout & Runner Alpha has also begun.

Volumes are expected to continue to increase, as well as for the CLI testing task, and more. Announcements are due to be made.

author: Mario
msg: Come on, constantly complaining doesn’t get anyone anywhere right now. We had several updates just last month, and Scout & Runner as well as the CLI tasks are already lined up and ready to go.
